list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.site_type::text FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id ORDER BY 1;

list.name: vo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS vo FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.description FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS vo, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS energy_wh FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY energy_wh DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT s.site_type::text AS site_type, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0)))::numeric,3) AS cfp_g FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cfp_g DESC;

SELECT s.description AS site, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS energy_wh, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0)))::numeric,3) AS cfp_g FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY energy_wh DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS vo, s.description AS site, s.site_type::text AS site_type, COUNT(*) AS jobs, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,6) AS energy_wh, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(CASE WHEN f.energy_wh IS NOT NULL AND f.pue IS NOT NULL AND f.ci_g IS NOT NULL THEN (f.energy_wh / 1000.0) * f.pue * f.ci_g ELSE f.cfp_g::double precision END, 0)))::numeric,6) AS cfp_g FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY cfp_g DESC LIMIT 200;
